title: GoogleAppsSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents the settings for Google Apps in Salesforce.

enableGmailButtons.description: Indicates whether the Gmail Buttons setting is enabled (true) or not (false).

enableGmailButtonsAndLinks.description: Indicates whether Gmail Buttons and Links are enabled (true) or not (false).

enableGmailLinks.description: Indicates whether the Gmail Links setting is enabled (true) or not (false).

enableGoogleDocs.description: Indicates whether the Add Google Docs to Salesforce setting is enabled (true) or not (false).

enableGoogleDocsTab.description: Indicates whether the Add Google Docs button on the Libraries tab is enabled (true) or not (false).

enableGoogleTalk.description: Indicates whether the Google Talk Sidebar Component is enabled (true) or not (false).

googleAppsDomain.description: Specifies the domain registered for your organization’s Google Apps account.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="GoogleAppsSettings">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="enableGmailButtons" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableGmailButtonsAndLinks" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableGmailLinks" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableGoogleDocs" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableGoogleDocsTab" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableGoogleTalk" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="googleAppsDomain" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:string"/>
        <xsd:element name="googleAppsDomainLinked" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="googleAppsDomainValidated" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```
